basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) has officially announced the Post-Doc Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the IIT Jammu official website. Candidates with a maximum age of 38 years and holding a Ph.D. in CSE, IT, or EC are eligible to apply online until 31-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and submit the online application are provided below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 38 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Women/Physically Handicapped candidates.

qualification.details: Post-Doc Fellow: Ph.D. in CSE/IT/EC. Desirable: Research experience in the field of Information Security.

salary_details.details: Post-Doc Fellow: INR 60,000/- per month + HRA as applicable

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirements Interview (Online platform)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Overview
IIT Jammu Post Doctoral Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Jammu Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Jammu Post-Doc Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jammu Post-Doc recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Post-Doc position at IIT Jammu is July 31, 2026. Ensure all required documents are uploaded before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Post-Doc role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Information Technology (IT), or Electronics and Communication (EC). Research experience in Information Security is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Post-Doc position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Post-Doc Fellow position is 38 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST/OBC/Women/Physically Handicapped candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Post-Doc position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of INR 60,000/- per month, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA) as per applicable rules.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Post-Doc position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their merit and the specific requirements of the project. This will be followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this Post-Doc recruitment at IIT Jammu. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Post-Doc position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job opportunity at IIT Jammu, specifically for research work related to the Information Security Education and Awareness (ISEA) Project Phase-III.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Jammu Post-Doc recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Jammu apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, this recruitment is open to eligible candidates from Across India. The institute is located in Jammu, but the application process is online.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this IIT Jammu Post-Doc recruitment is IITJMU/R&C/RP00236/2026/A-29.
